articleTitle: CPS Energy and Ashtrom Break Ground on 150MW El Patrimonio Solar Project in Texas
sourceUrl: ConstructionFront article; CPS Energy; Ashtrom Renewable Energy
sourceType: ConstructionFront + official owner/utility sources cited by article
summary: Article reports groundbreaking/construction start for 150MWac solar project in Bexar County with Ashtrom as developer, CPS Energy as offtaker for about 70% of output and SOLV Energy as construction-through-operations partner.
sourceNotes: Do not treat the PPA/offtake component as a construction contract award. 2027 operation target is indicative from source wording.

articleTitle: STRABAG consortium wins €177 million D35 motorway contract in the Czech Republic
sourceUrl: ConstructionFront article; STRABAG; road authority information cited in pilot review
summary: Article reports EUR 177m contract for 16.3km Úlibice-Hořice section of D35 motorway, with STRABAG-led consortium and April 2026 construction start.
sourceNotes: JV/consortium parties are split in party table for searchability. Construction start month retained only because pilot source notes supported April 2026.

articleTitle: Jacobs Awarded EPCM Contract for Hut 8’s 1GW Beacon Point AI Data Center Campus in Texas
sourceType: ConstructionFront + official company sources cited by article
summary: Article reports Jacobs sole-source EPCM role for Hut 8 Beacon Point AI data center campus in Nueces County with 1GW utility capacity and USD 17bn first two phases.
sourceNotes: EPCM award is a services/management delivery event, not evidence that physical construction is complete or operational.

articleTitle: Technip Energies receives substantial authorization to advance Commonwealth LNG ahead of FID
summary: Earlier update linked to the same Commonwealth LNG project: Technip Energies received substantial authorization ahead of FID.
sourceNotes: This is an update/event on the same project, not a second project record. Kept as pre-FID commercial event.

articleTitle: Caturus Reaches FID, Closes $9.75bn Financing and Issues NTP to Technip Energies for Commonwealth LNG in Louisiana
commercialEventType: Financing Close; Full Notice to Proceed
sourceType: ConstructionFront + official company sources cited by article
summary: Article reports FID, USD 9.75bn financing close and full NTP to Technip Energies for Commonwealth LNG in Cameron Parish.
sourceNotes: Financing close is not automatically a construction contract award, though full NTP confirms EPC execution path. Operation timing requires source check.

articleTitle: RWE and Apollo Global Management Form Strategic Joint Venture for German Grid Expansion
sourceType: ConstructionFront + official company source cited by article
summary: Article reports RWE and Apollo strategic JV with EUR 3.2bn upfront contribution linked to RWE shareholding in Amprion for German grid expansion.
sourceNotes: Broad programme/financing record. Do not represent as a single project dot without a package-level child record.
